_comment: POST /api/v1/applications — Ollama LLM server, migrating from openclaw to agentsonly (CC-077). NOTE: ollama was failing on openclaw (context deadline exceeded, chart install timeout — likely large model pull). Monitor after deploy.
_curl: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Forwarded-User: martin' -H 'X-Auth-Request-Groups: cluster-operators' -d @applications/ollama-agentsonly.json http://localhost:8000/api/v1/applications

_schema_review.name: str — application name, used as namespace + HelmRelease name
_schema_review.cluster: str — target cluster; routes to agentsonly-apps and agentsonly-infra repos
_schema_review.chart_name: str — chart name within the repo
_schema_review.chart_version: str — 1.52.0 was installed on openclaw (chart version, not ollama version)
_schema_review.values_yaml: str — values copied from openclaw configmap ollama-values-hfk4gddm96

name: ollama
values_yaml:
replicaCount: 1

ollama:
  models:
    pull:
      - nomic-embed-text
      - phi3.5

resources:
  requests:
    cpu: "2000m"
    memory: "4Gi"
  limits:
    cpu: "8000m"
    memory: "16Gi"

persistentVolume:
  enabled: true
  size: 20Gi
  storageClass: piraeus-datastore
